<!-- generated by sofar — do not hand-edit; truth lives in events.jsonl -->

# Decisions: initiative-list

- 2026-07-11T11:10:58.392Z — chose **Listing shape (pre-registered, 1.1): MCP surface = get_state view:"initiatives" (no new tool); CLI surface = new `sofar list` command; a list line carries slug, bound branch(es) via reverse bindings map, progress (done/total tasks), active phase, clipped next action; ordered by last event ulid descending (record recency), initiatives with empty/unreadable logs last by slug asc; unknown_initiative errors from resolveInitiative append a count-capped available-initiatives line** over (a) a new sofar_list_initiatives MCP tool; (b) CLI-only listing with no MCP surface; (c) slug-alphabetical ordering because an 8th tool grows every session's cached tool-definition prefix for a rarely-issued query, while get_state already owns progressive disclosure (digest/full) — a third view is its natural axis and needs no initiative resolution, which is exactly the unbound-branch case the feature exists for; CLI-only leaves MCP agents dead-ended except via the error path; recency-first is the resume-relevant order ("which initiative was live?") and stays deterministic because it derives from ulids already in the record — alphabetical discards that signal
